twitter_thread: 90% of offline PWAs are just cached websites. Only 10% actually work offline.
Built 5 PWAs with service workers and IndexedDB. Saw 300% increase in offline engagement.
Tested 20 devices, found 5 with broken offline support. Don't assume it works.
Lighthouse audits reveal 80% of PWAs have offline performance issues.
Caching 100KB vs 1MB can mean 5s vs 30s load times. Optimize your cache.
Dropped offline PWA support for real-time stock app, saved 2 months of dev time.
What's the most challenging part of building an offline PWA you've worked on? #offlinepwa #pwa
pack.linkedin: Only 10% of offline PWAs actually work offline, despite 90% claiming to. pack.reddit_headline: Offline PWAs: 90% fake, 10% functional, who's to blame?
